reviews.comment:
Muy bien ubicada, me gustó mucho la zona de descanso al lado del río, con sombra, mesas y banquetas para descansar.

(Translated by Google)
Very well located, I really liked the rest area next to the river, with shade, tables and benches to rest.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atencion del personal de playa, cabe destacar que quedan pocas personas que ayudan a solucionar todo.

(Translated by Google)
The beach staff were very helpful, although it's worth noting that there are only a few people left who are able to help resolve any issues.

reviews.comment:
Cada vez menos opciones y menos productos lo bueno es la cola unificada para las cajas lo hace más ágil

(Translated by Google)
Fewer and fewer options and fewer products, but the good thing is the unified queue for the checkouts makes it faster.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHN2VxeXhnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lo más estratégico es la demora en el despacho de combustible, obligándote a consumir algo en el local.(cargo muy seguido, no me lo contaron)
8 bocas de surtidores para 3 playeros como mucho.
Para los que andan vacacionando no es un problema, pero si lo es para los laburantes.
De los baños y el local nada que decir, excelentes.

(Translated by Google)
The most strategic thing is the delay in fuel dispensing, forcing you to buy something at the station. (I fill up very frequently, I didn't hear about it from someone else.) Eight pumps for a maximum of three attendants. This isn't a problem for vacationers, but it is for working people. The restrooms and the station itself are excellent.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHMWRya3VBRRAB
